description: A customer wants to purchase four tickets for an upcoming concert through the venue's website.

nodes.task_description: Help the customer select four adjacent seats in a specific section.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds four tickets from the selected section to the customer's cart.

nodes.task_description: Process the credit card payment for the tickets.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully completes the financial transaction.

nodes.task_description: Deliver the digital tickets to the customer's email address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends an email containing the QR codes for the four tickets.
